name: 15oz 6pk Stemless Hutton Wine Glasses - Threshold™
description:
Sip your drinks in style with these 6-Pack Stemless Hutton Wine Glasses from Threshold™. Made of glass, these transparent wine glasses are perfect for serving your red, white or sparkling wines. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, these 15-ounce wine glasses add classy flair to your drinks and are easy to hold with the stemless design.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
